signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2.2% YoY, Below Forecasts of 2.4% | NO | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, but fell short of market expectations of 2.4%, signaling contained price pressures amid Middle East energy volatility.[1]  
This is the most recent data available as of April 18, 2026, with no n
